title: My Mom Says You Have Sugar
teaching_point: What T1D is — sugar goes up with food, insulin brings it down. Simple. No big deal.

scenes.subtitle_text: Miraai! Miraai! My mom says you have sugar!
scenes.voice_text: Miraai! Miraai! My mom says you have sugar!

scenes.subtitle_text: Yes, Gatiepie! Let me show you.
scenes.voice_text: Yes, Gatiepie! Let me show you.

scenes.visual_note: Simple glucose curve — sugar rises with food, insulin brings it down
scenes.subtitle_text: Sugar goes up when I eat. Insulin brings it down. My body just needs a little help.
scenes.voice_text: See? Sugar goes up when I eat. Insulin brings it down. My body just needs a little help.
